시편 18:1.content: I love you, Yahweh, my strength.

시편 18:2.content: Yahweh is my rock, my fortress, and my deliverer; my God, my rock, in whom I take refuge; my shield, and the horn of my salvation, my high tower.

시편 18:3.content: I call on Yahweh, who is worthy to be praised; and I am saved from my enemies.

시편 18:4.content: The cords of death surrounded me. The floods of ungodliness made me afraid.

시편 18:5.content: The cords of Sheol were around me. The snares of death came on me.

시편 18:6.content: In my distress I called on Yahweh, and cried to my God. He heard my voice out of his temple. My cry before him came into his ears.

시편 18:7.content: Then the earth shook and trembled. The foundations also of the mountains quaked and were shaken, because he was angry.

시편 18:8.content: Smoke went out of his nostrils. Consuming fire came out of his mouth. Coals were kindled by it.

시편 18:9.content: He bowed the heavens also, and came down. Thick darkness was under his feet.

시편 18:10.content: He rode on a cherub, and flew. Yes, he soared on the wings of the wind.

시편 18:11.content: He made darkness his hiding place, his pavilion around him, darkness of waters, thick clouds of the skies.

시편 18:12.content: At the brightness before him his thick clouds passed, hailstones and coals of fire.

시편 18:13.content: Yahweh also thundered in the sky. The Most High uttered his voice: hailstones and coals of fire.

시편 18:14.content: He sent out his arrows, and scattered them; Yes, great lightning bolts, and routed them.

시편 18:15.content: Then the channels of waters appeared. The foundations of the world were laid bare at your rebuke, Yahweh, at the blast of the breath of your nostrils.

시편 18:16.content: He sent from on high. He took me. He drew me out of many waters.

시편 18:17.content: He delivered me from my strong enemy, from those who hated me; for they were too mighty for me.

시편 18:18.content: They came on me in the day of my calamity, but Yahweh was my support.

시편 18:19.content: He brought me out also into a large place. He delivered me, because he delighted in me.

시편 18:20.content: Yahweh has rewarded me according to my righteousness. According to the cleanness of my hands, he has recompensed me.

시편 18:21.content: For I have kept the ways of Yahweh, and have not wickedly departed from my God.

시편 18:22.content: For all his ordinances were before me. I didn’t put away his statutes from me.

시편 18:23.content: I was also blameless with him. I kept myself from my iniquity.

시편 18:24.content: Therefore Yahweh has rewarded me according to my righteousness, according to the cleanness of my hands in his eyesight.

시편 18:25.content: With the merciful you will show yourself merciful. With the perfect man, you will show yourself perfect.

시편 18:26.content: With the pure, you will show yourself pure. With the crooked you will show yourself shrewd.

시편 18:27.content: For you will save the afflicted people, but the arrogant eyes you will bring down.

시편 18:28.content: For you will light my lamp, Yahweh. My God will light up my darkness.

시편 18:29.content: For by you, I advance through a troop. By my God, I leap over a wall.

시편 18:30.content: As for God, his way is perfect. Yahweh’s word is tried. He is a shield to all those who take refuge in him.

시편 18:31.content: For who is God, except Yahweh? Who is a rock, besides our God,

시편 18:32.content: the God who arms me with strength, and makes my way perfect?

시편 18:33.content: He makes my feet like deer’s feet, and sets me on my high places.

시편 18:34.content: He teaches my hands to war, so that my arms bend a bow of bronze.

시편 18:35.content: You have also given me the shield of your salvation. Your right hand sustains me. Your gentleness has made me great.

시편 18:36.content: You have enlarged my steps under me, My feet have not slipped.

시편 18:37.content: I will pursue my enemies, and overtake them. I won’t turn away until they are consumed.

시편 18:38.content: I will strike them through, so that they will not be able to rise. They shall fall under my feet.

시편 18:39.content: For you have armed me with strength to the battle. You have subdued under me those who rose up against me.

시편 18:40.content: You have also made my enemies turn their backs to me, that I might cut off those who hate me.

시편 18:41.content: They cried, but there was no one to save; even to Yahweh, but he didn’t answer them.

시편 18:42.content: Then I beat them small as the dust before the wind. I cast them out as the mire of the streets.

시편 18:43.content: You have delivered me from the strivings of the people. You have made me the head of the nations. A people whom I have not known shall serve me.

시편 18:44.content: As soon as they hear of me they shall obey me. The foreigners shall submit themselves to me.

시편 18:45.content: The foreigners shall fade away, and shall come trembling out of their strongholds.

시편 18:46.content: Yahweh lives! Blessed be my rock. Exalted be the God of my salvation,

시편 18:47.content: even the God who executes vengeance for me, and subdues peoples under me.

시편 18:48.content: He rescues me from my enemies. Yes, you lift me up above those who rise up against me. You deliver me from the violent man.

시편 18:49.content: Therefore I will give thanks to you, Yahweh, among the nations, and will sing praises to your name.

시편 18:50.content: He gives great deliverance to his king, and shows loving kindness to his anointed, to David and to his offspring, forever more.
